mapper.select: SELECT a.*, d.dept_name, u.nickname AS manager_name, c.name AS category_name FROM sys_asset a LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.manager_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_asset WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
SELECT c.name AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_asset a LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 GROUP BY a.category_id, c.name
